chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No. D-721 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3248/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.10.2025 Mr. Rab Dino Makwal, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Larik, Advocate for respondents-university Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ***************** Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate, has filed a Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, same is taken on record. The learned counsel for the respondent-university has also filed a statement, which is likewise taken on record. Upon perusal of the record, it appears that a previous petition bearing No. D-711 of 2024, filed by the petitioner with similar prayers as the present petition, was dismissed by this Court vide order dated 13.06.2024. In that order, it was held that the matter could not be decided within the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. Furthermore, the order of allotment challenged through the present petition is not available on record, and despite being granted an opportunity, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to produce the same. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition stands dismissed as not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE M.Ali*
